'''vashoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okuritsuridashi|okuritsuridashi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okuritsuridashi|okuritsuridashi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vashoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || væshereth || væsherej || væsheresh || væshere
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || vashoshoroth || vashoshoroj || vashoshorosh || vashoshoro
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || vashoroth || vashoroj || vashorosh || vashoro
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || vashofrofth || vashofrofj || vashofrofsh || vashofrof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vashorotho || vashorojo || vashorosho || vashoroko
|-
| [[Patient]] || vashoroth || vashoroj || vashorosh || vashoro
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vashorothol || vashorojol || vashoroshol || vashorokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vashoroothotho || vashoroojojo || vashorooshosho || vashorooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || vashorothon || vashorojon || vashoroshon || vashorokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vashorothooro || vashorojooro || vashoroshooro || vashorokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
